applyTo: "README.md,docs/**,AGENTS.md,CLAUDE.md,.github/**,.claude/skills/**,scripts/**"

# Governance Instructions

- `AGENTS.md` is the canonical repository rule source.
- Keep governance summaries aligned with the CLI-only Vietnam core build.
- Run `python scripts/check_ai_assets.py` after governance changes.
- Keep `README.md` high-level and detailed behavior in `docs/`.
